reset_and_run_check.note: The CLI manages the workspace-validated reset-and-run gate fields and also exposes related debug settings for diagnosis.

warnings: Multiple DAP-Link probes are visible; implicit selection is unsafe.
suggestions: Re-run with `-u <probe_uid>` to pin the intended probe.
Use `py -3 keil-cli.py detect -u <probe_uid>` before programming to verify the target behind that probe.
